title: Déressia Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Déressia with a Z-Score of +5.09. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave in Déressia is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 16.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 34%, and wind speed is moderate at 13.0 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Day (HDD) value is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating requirements.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
